Table	Create Table
executions	CREATE TABLE `executions` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uid` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `profile_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `scenario_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('PENDING','RUNNING','PASSED','FAILED','ERROR','CANCELLED') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
  `runner_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `script_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `script_version` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `dataset_bundle_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `target_env` enum('DEV','PREPROD','PILOT_ORANGE','PROD') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `runner_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `ai_repair_from_execution_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `started_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `finished_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `duration_ms` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `artifacts_count` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `incidents_count` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `executions_uid_unique` (`uid`),
  KEY `idx_exec_project` (`project_id`),
  KEY `idx_exec_status` (`status`),
  KEY `idx_exec_scenario` (`scenario_id`),
  KEY `idx_exec_created` (`created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=90001
